findings.defect: Japanese「」brackets used in Chinese text; standard Chinese should use「」or 『』but 「」is acceptable; however the Japanese source has 「似た問題...」in a ZH context — mixed bracket convention in zh text
findings.evidence_excerpt: 「相似的题目会反复出现」

findings.defect: 'English text X' is an OCR/redaction placeholder that leaks into the translated output; learner sees meaningless reference 'X'
findings.evidence_excerpt: A thousand drills inside English text X

findings.defect: '英文X' placeholder leaks into ZH text; same meaningless reference
findings.evidence_excerpt: 在英文X里给我来1000次反复练习

findings.defect: '英文X' is likely an OCR artifact or redacted book title placeholder in the source
findings.evidence_excerpt: 英文Xの中で1000本ノックだ

findings.defect: Surface and definition are nearly identical in all three languages; definition adds no new information beyond the surface text
findings.evidence_excerpt: Each study unit's length is set so it can be finished within the 20-30 minutes that concentration tends to last

findings.defect: JP/ZH use '●' bullet marker; EN uses '*' — style inconsistency across languages in same figure caption
findings.evidence_excerpt: * IT Passport Exam Syllabus

findings.defect: 'BIOS mediates' is inaccurate; BIOS initializes/interfaces hardware, not 'mediates'. Should be 'the timing at which BIOS intervenes' or 'the role BIOS plays'
findings.evidence_excerpt: the timing at which BIOS mediates

findings.defect: 'BIOSが媒介するタイミング' — 媒介 implies BIOS acts as intermediary/bridge; more accurate JP would be 'BIOSが関与するタイミング' or 'BIOSが起動するタイミング'
findings.evidence_excerpt: BIOSが媒介するタイミング

findings.defect: Caption describes RAID as 'writing the same content to multiple hard disks to improve reliability' — this is RAID-1 (mirroring) specifically, not RAID in general. RAID-5/6 use parity, not identical copies. Teaching this as 'the RAID method' conflates RAID-1 behavior with all RAID, causing exam-critical misconception.
findings.evidence_excerpt: 複数のハードディスクに同じ内容を書きこませることで信頼性を高めるRAIDの方式

findings.defect: Same RAID misconception in ZH: 'through letting multiple hard disks write the same content to improve reliability' describes RAID-1 only, not RAID generally. RAID-5/6 use striping+parity.
findings.evidence_excerpt: 通过让多块硬盘写入相同内容来提升可靠性的RAID方式

findings.defect: Same RAID misconception in EN: 'the RAID method that improves reliability by writing the same content to multiple hard disks' — this is RAID-1 specifically. The figure caption implies this is RAID's defining characteristic, which is factually incorrect for RAID-5/6/10.
findings.evidence_excerpt: the RAID method that improves reliability by writing the same content to multiple hard disks

findings.defect: Page 17 has 0 entities and leaf_count=0; may be a chapter divider/blank page. No content to audit.
findings.evidence_excerpt: entities: []

findings.defect: Section title is a 'What is X' question form but missing question mark: 'What is the IT Passport Exam' should be 'What Is the IT Passport Exam?' or structured as statement
findings.evidence_excerpt: What is the IT Passport Exam

findings.defect: Section title '什么是IT护照考试' is interrogative form but missing Chinese question mark（？）
findings.evidence_excerpt: 什么是IT护照考试

findings.defect: IT Passport uses IRT (Item Response Theory) scaling to 1000 points; passing = 600 total + 300 per field — not raw 60%/30%. Describing as percentage may mislead exam candidates expecting simple correct-answer ratio scoring.
findings.evidence_excerpt: 全体で60％以上に正解すること

findings.defect: Same IRT scoring simplification in ZH: '总分正确率达到60％以上' implies raw percentage, but actual scoring is IRT-scaled 1000-point system (600/300).
findings.evidence_excerpt: 总分正确率达到60％以上

findings.defect: Same IRT scoring simplification in EN: 'Achieve 60% or more correct overall' misrepresents the IRT-based 1000-point scale system.
findings.evidence_excerpt: Achieve 60% or more correct overall

findings.defect: Pass rate data (54.4%) is from April-August 2022 period — potentially stale for an R6 (2024) edition textbook. Learners may be misled about current difficulty.

Terminology drift: caption uses '双系统' for デュアルシステム but glossary entry (g_xxx) uses '双工系统'. These are different terms in Chinese IT; 双工 = duplex/dual-channel, 双系统 = dual-system/dual-boot. Learner encounters inconsistent terminology in same product.
findings.evidence_excerpt: 双系统

findings.defect: Caption uses 'dual systems' (lowercase plural) while glossary uses 'Dual System' (title case singular); minor style inconsistency
findings.evidence_excerpt: dual systems, thin clients

findings.defect: Japanese「」brackets and Japanese middle dot (・) leak into ZH caption: '「解答・解析」栏' should use Chinese full-width 「」or '解答与解析' construction; ・ is not standard ZH punctuation
findings.evidence_excerpt: 在「解答・解析」栏中排列各项解析

findings.defect: JP/ZH use enclosed circle numbers ❼❽❾ in figure caption; EN replaces them with '7. 8. 9.' — visual reference inconsistency if learner switches language views
findings.evidence_excerpt: marked by the numbers 7. Question, 8. Answer, and 9. Explanation
